stories.headline: UK police accused of double standard in handling stabbing death of 18-year-old Henry Nowak

perspectives.label: Conservative
perspectives.body: 🚨 UPDATE: Elon Musk is going BALLISTIC on the double standard of UK police allowing 18-year-old white male Nick Nowak to be KILLED by a perpetrator who cried "he was being racist," instead of going after the killer

perspectives.label: Independent
perspectives.body: There were massive international protests over George Floyd and those police involved were severely punished with long prison sentences, yet the police responsible here did not even lose their jobs! An incredibly unjust double-standard!

perspectives.label: Democrat
perspectives.body: An 18-year-old kid gets stabbed in the street. He’s running for his life, begging for help, and instead of saving him, the police handcuff him while he bleeds out because the attacker claimed “racism.”

stories.headline: Putin highlights multipolar world with no single hegemon as Russia-China ties strengthen

perspectives.label: Conservative
perspectives.body: I know this isn’t sexy news… but this is actually pretty huge.. 🚨 Secretary Brooke Rollins just gave a China the Middle Finger and announced three quick historic actions to RESTART and expand U.S. fertilizer manufacturing in the United States

perspectives.label: Independent
perspectives.body: 🇷🇺 "A multipolar world means no hegemons. Even with giants like India and China, no single nation should dominate global politics. Everyone must be equal." — Putin

perspectives.label: Democrat
perspectives.body: This isn't AI, it's the Huajiang Canyon Bridge in Guizhou, China, the world's highest bridge at 625 meters above the river beneath it.

stories.headline: Israeli minister Ben-Gvir posts taunting video of detained Global Sumud Flotilla activists

perspectives.label: Conservative
perspectives.body: You’re a psychopath. No wonder Israel’s reputation is plunging around the world with people like you in its Govt.

perspectives.label: Independent
perspectives.body: You may not treat Polish citizens who have committed no crime in this way. In the democratic world we do not abuse and gloat over people in custody. We demand justice for our citizens and consequences for you.

perspectives.label: Democrat
perspectives.body: I am truly appalled at the video posted by Israeli Cabinet Minister Ben-Gvir taunting those involved in the Global Sumud Flotilla. This violates the most basic standards of respect and dignity in the way people should be treated.

stories.body: BREAKING: Barney Frank, a longtime Democratic congressman who crafted financial reforms and brought visibility to gay rights, dies.

stories.headline: Jan. 6 officers sue to block Trump administration’s fund for rioters
stories.body: Breaking News: Two officers who defended the Capitol on Jan. 6, 2021, sued to block the creation of the Trump administration’s $1.8 billion fund that would reward rioters and groups that committed violence on behalf of President Trump.

stories.headline: Explosives techs remove unexploded drone from Odesa high-rise
stories.body: Explosives technicians on Wednesday removed an unexploded drone lodged in the facade of a residential high-rise building in Odesa, Ukraine. The unexploded drone was stuck on the 15th floor of a 24-story residential building, video shared by Ukraine's State Emergency Service shows.

stories.headline: Michael Bay developing movie about U.S./Iran war based on real events.
stories.body:
Michael Bay is developing a movie about the U.S./Iran war.

The film follows the story of the 2 U.S. pilots rescued after their planes were shot down during Operation Epic Fury in Iran. 

(Source: Deadline)

stories.headline: Quinta Brunson to star in Betty Boop film adaptation.

Quinta Brunson will star in a film adaptation of ‘Betty Boop.’

She is developing the movie with the grandson of the man who created Betty Boop.

stories.headline: Quinta Brunson to star as Betty Boop in new origin story film
stories.body:
Quinta Brunson will star as Betty Boop in a new film.

The film - made in collaboration with the creator's grandson - would follow the origin & evolution of Betty Boop through the POV of her creator, Max Fleischer.

(Source: https://variety.com/2026/film/news/quinta-brunson-betty-boop-movie-1236754550/

stories.headline: Psyche spacecraft gets Mars gravity assist en route to asteroid
stories.body:
First stop, Mars. Next stop, Psyche 📍

On May 15, our Psyche spacecraft swung by Mars on its way to its next destination: a metal-rich asteroid also named Psyche. The Red Planet gave the spacecraft a 1,000-mph speed boost and provided some stunning photos as well!

stories.headline: California secures FEMA grant for BainFire suppression in Riverside County
stories.body:
California just secured an additional Fire Management Assistance Grant from @FEMA to guarantee critical resources for suppressing the #BainFire in Riverside County.

As crews continue to work around the clock in Southern California, follow emergency guidance from local officials.

stories.headline: Multiple large wildfires continue to threaten Southern California with evacuations
stories.body: Fueled by gusting winds and warm temperatures, multiple large wildfires continued to menace Southern California on Wednesday, prompting thousands of residents to evacuate, authorities said. https://abcnews.com/US/multiple-large-wildfires-menacing-southern-california-prompting-thousands/story?id=133145470&cid=social_twitter_abcn

stories.headline: Wildfire rages on uninhabited island off Southern California after boater rescue
stories.body:
A wildfire is raging on an uninhabited island off Southern California after rescuers saved a shipwrecked boater there.

ABC News' Sam Champion reports. https://abcnews.com/video/133143929/?utm_source=facebook&utm_medium=social&utm_campaign=dhfacebook&utm_content=app.dashsocial.com/abcnews/library/media/675235619

stories.headline: Bill Gates’ microneedle mRNA patch with quantum-dot QR codes for permanent tracking.
stories.body:
BILL GATES’ MICRONEEDLE mRNA PATCH IS HERE

Meet the new “vaccine” that doesn’t just jab you — it permanently tattoos your body with modified mRNA AND quantum-dot QR codes.

One painless patch on your wrist (or wherever) dissolves, floods you with mRNA, and embeds scannable biotech markers that last years — possibly forever.

No phone needed.  
No card.  
No paper passport.

Just scan your skin at the store, airport, or restaurant and the system instantly knows your “vaccine status,” batch number, and compliance level.

This is the biological control grid planned for the next plandemic — a permanent digital prison under your skin.

They’re not hiding it anymore.

Your body is the barcode.

Wake up.  
Resist.

stories.headline: Man awarded $835k after jail time for posting Charlie Kirk meme
stories.body: The man who spent 37 days in jail for posting a Charlie Kirk meme on Facebook was just awarded $835,000 for a violation of his first amendment rights

stories.headline: Pepsi Harrier jet ad court case story
stories.body: In 1996, Pepsi ran an ad where 7 million Pepsi Points got you a Harrier jet. One guy tried to claim it. Pepsi said it was obviously a joke, and the whole thing ended up in court.
